FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Geopolitical tensions amplify USD strength via Iran ceasefire uncertainty
BOJ’s rate hawk signaling contrasts with JPY weakness from tsunami risk
AI identifies MA20 as critical support level post-volatility clustering
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bullish via geopolitical catalysts and MA20 support. BOJ pause widens USD/JPY rally.
FX.comment: Geopolitical catalysts and MA20 alignment drive high-conviction above-trend trade

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: S&P 500 nears critical support at MA20 ahead of mixed earnings season
Geopolitical risks from US-Iran standoff and OPEC+ tensions create volatility
Institutional order flow suggests accumulation ahead of resistance breakout
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 faces MA20 support test amid geopolitical risks and earnings season. Mixed sentiment ahead.
STOCKS.comment: S&P 500 faces MA20 support test amid geopolitical risks and earnings season. Mixed sentiment ahead.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Signals Support at MA20 as ETF Flows Strengthen
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC rallies on $1B ETF inflows; AI flags MA20 support; bullish bias confirmed by technical structure and macro flow now.
CRYPTO.comment: AI detects support at MA20 amid bullish ETF inflows
